case_title: CANAS RONALD VS MORALES EDDY BAYARDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CANAS RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES EDDY BAYARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES EDDY BAYARDO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MORALES EDDY BAYARDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANAS RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES EDDY BAYARDO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,029.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANAS RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES EDDY BAYARDO $188.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $188.00, PLTF. TO PAY DEF. $188.00=$150 ATT.FEES+$38 COSTS. ENTERED ON 2/18/93 IN SUP.CT.SCA 22278. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
